zh.lifeSummary: Richard Burt是Jhon Burt Birbi的兒子，於1578年出生。他和margaret burt至少有1個兒子。他去世於1647年享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Burt是Jhon Burt Birbi的儿子，于1578年出生。他和margaret burt至少有1个儿子。他去世于1647年享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

nameMeanings.name: Burt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mainly U.S.: of various origins. In the case of the film actor  Burt Lancaster  (  1913–1994 ) it is a short form of   Burton  , but it has also been used as a variant spelling of   Bert .  The pianist and composer  Burt Bacharach  (  b. 1928 ) was the son of a  Bert Bacharach , and his given name is presumably simply a variation of his father's.

en.lifeSummary: Richard Burt was born in 1578 as the son of Jhon Burt Birbi. He had at least 1 son with margaret burt. He died in 1647, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Burt est né en 1578, fils de Jhon Burt Birbi. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec margaret burt. Il est décédé en 1647, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Burt wurde 1578, als Sohn von Jhon Burt Birbi geboren. Er hatte mit margaret burt mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1647 im Alter von 69 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Burt è nato il nel 1578 come figlio di Jhon Burt Birbi. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con margaret burt. Morì nel 1647, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.Dorchester, Dorset, England: イギリスドールセトドールチェスター
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Burtは1578年にJhon Burt Birbiの息子として生まれた。彼はmargaret burtとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1647年に69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Burt(은)는 1578년 Jhon Burt Birbi의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 margaret burt(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1647년 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Burt nasceu em 1578 filho de Jhon Burt Birbi. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com margaret burt. Ele faleceu em 1647, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Burt родился в 1578 г. Его отца звали Jhon Burt Birbi. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от margaret burt. Он умер в 1647 г. в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Burt nació en 1578 como hijo de Jhon Burt Birbi. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con margaret burt. Murió en 1647, a la edad de 69 años.
